output.code:
# Let's open and read the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-MWtTJ9pmvUqgHqPnZBFPLQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:500]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-MWtTJ9pmvUqgHqPnZBFPLQ-text_to_analyse.txt", 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()

# Find indices of double quotes
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
quote_positions[:20], len(quote_positions)

spans = []
for idx in range(0, len(quote_positions)-1, 2):
    start = quote_positions[idx]+1
    end = quote_positions[idx+1]  # end exclusive normally? We'll include up to end-1
    span_text = text[start:end]
    spans.append((start, end, span_text))
# Check if odd number of quotes; handle unmatched last quote
if len(quote_positions) % 2 == 1:
    start = quote_positions[-1] + 1
    end = len(text)
    span_text = text[start:end]
    spans.append((start, end, span_text))

len(spans)
for i, (s,e,st) in enumerate(spans[:10]):
    print(i, s, e, st)

for i,(s,e,st) in enumerate(spans[10:20], start=10):
    print(i, s, e, st)
